# Entrypoints

CLI, MCP server, tool handlers, filesystem watcher — the outward-facing surfaces — plus the composition root that wires the graph for a process.

**Tier:** Entrypoints

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.cli` | L | 0 | 16 |
| `lithos.cli_reconcile` | M | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.pipeline` | S | 1 | 1 |
| `lithos.server` | L | 1 | 2 |
| `lithos.tools` | XS | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.tools._seam` | XS | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.tools.agents` | S | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.tools.findings_stats` | S | 0 | 1 |

| `lithos.tools.notes` | M | 0 | 1 |

| `lithos.tools.tasks` | L | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos.watch_intake` | M | 1 | 0 |

## Public API

### `lithos.cli`
- def `cli` — Lithos - Local shared knowledge base for AI agents.
- def `serve` — Start the Lithos MCP server.
- def `reindex` — Rebuild search indices from knowledge files.
- def `recalibrate_salience` — One-time backfill: lift decay-collapsed salience rows to the floor.
- def `validate` — Validate knowledge base integrity.
- def `stats` — Show knowledge base statistics.
- def `search` — Search the knowledge base.
- def `reconcile` — Reconcile derived projections (indices, graph) against the markdown corpus.
- def `extract_entities_cmd` — Re-extract entity frontmatter across the corpus (#313).
- def `inspect` — Inspect agent state, tasks, documents, and backend health.
- def `inspect_health` — Show backend health (single signal via SearchEngine.health()).
- def `inspect_agents` — List registered agents and their last-seen time.
- def `inspect_tasks` — List coordination tasks (open by default).
- def `inspect_doc` — Inspect a knowledge document by ID or path.
- def `audit` — Show the read-access audit log.
- def `main` — Main entry point.

### `lithos.cli_reconcile`
- def `reconcile` — Reconcile derived projections against the markdown source of truth.

### `lithos.pipeline`
- class `Pipeline` — A fully-wired, not-yet-running Lithos component graph.
- def `build_pipeline` — Build the component graph for *config*, in dependency order.

### `lithos.server`
- class `LithosServer` — Lithos MCP Server.
- def `get_server` — Get or create the global server instance.
- def `create_server` — Create a new server instance.

### `lithos.tools`
- def `register_all` — Register every extracted tool domain, in a fixed order.

### `lithos.tools._seam`
- def `tool_span` — Run the handler inside a ``lithos.tool.<short>`` span.

### `lithos.tools.agents`
- def `register` — Register the agent-registry tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.tools.findings_stats`
- def `register` — Register the finding/stats tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.tools.memory_edges`
- def `register` — Register the memory/edge tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.tools.notes`
- def `register` — Register the note tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.tools.read_search`
- def `register` — Register the read/search tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.tools.tasks`
- def `register` — Register the task tools. See the late-binding rule in :mod:`lithos.tools`.

### `lithos.watch_intake`
- class `WatchIntake` — Filesystem-driven Corpus mutations. Peer of :class:`CorpusIntake`.
